Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Schema

  • Packages that use Schema 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return Schema 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Schema SchemaBuilder.build()
      Builds a Schema instance based on the configured parameters.
      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder with parameters of type Schema 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      SchemaBuilder SchemaBuilder.withItems​(Schema items)
      Sets the schema for the items in an array schema.
      FunctionDeclarationBuilder FunctionDeclarationBuilder.withParameters​(Schema parameters)
      Sets the parameters for the function.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withResponseSchema​(Schema responseSchema)
      Sets the response schema for the generation config.
      GenerationResourceBuilder GenerationResourceBuilder.withToolFunctionDeclaration​(String name, String description, TypeEnum type, String format, String descriptionSchema, Boolean nullable, List<String> enumValues, Schema items)
      Adds a function declaration to the list of function declarations for the tool.
